simulated_answers.answer: Yes. The patient has qualifying migraine, 9 migraine days per month, more than one year of migraine history, and onset before age 50.
Yes. The patient is fluent in English and agrees to follow-up, twice-daily Transcendental Meditation practice, stable migraine medication dosing, and baseline headache logs.

The patient is not practicing Transcendental Meditation, does not have medication overuse headache, is not pregnant or breastfeeding, has not recently started prophylactic migraine medicine, and does not have any interfering systemic or psychiatric illness.
The patient has not received platinum chemotherapy.
The patient does not have active interstitial lung disease, active autoimmune disease, uncontrolled cardiac disease, active uncontrolled infection, or organ transplant history.

simulated_answers.answer: Yes. The patient has migraine with aura for more than 12 months, averages 2 aura days per month, and is willing to provide informed consent.

The patient does not have a disallowed headache disorder, interfering clinically significant disorder, self-harm risk, pregnancy, cardiovascular or cerebrovascular disease, qualifying hypertension, or qualifying hypotension.
The patient has not changed prophylactic medication within two months, has not taken acute migraine medication within 48 hours, and has not had headache or aura within 48 hours of infusion.
The patient has not received platinum chemotherapy.
The patient does not have active interstitial lung disease, active autoimmune disease, uncontrolled cardiac disease, active uncontrolled infection, or organ transplant history.

questions.question: Has the patient had migraine with aura for at least 12 months, at least one monthly aura day on average over the three months before screening, and willingness to provide informed consent?

Has the patient changed prophylactic medication within two months, taken acute migraine medication within 48 hours of infusion, or had headache or aura within 48 hours of infusion?
Has the patient previously received platinum chemotherapy?
